channel.name: ❓・how-to-claim-earnings
channel.topic: How to claim the earnings you won in tournaments

messages.content:
### __How to Claim Your Earning__
- Step 1: Go to <https://epicgames.com/competitive>
- Step 2: Sign in to the account that you used for the competition for which you are claiming a prize
- Step 3: Under `MY PRIZES`, locate and choose the blue `START TAX INTERVIEW` button
- Step 4: Follow the steps to start the process

- Use a PC / Laptop as the form may not load on phones
- Source of information: <https://www.epicgames.com/help/en-US/c-Category_Fortnite/c-Fortnite_Competitive/how-do-i-claim-my-prize-a000084710>
